categories.description: an email that is related to helping out a customer.they may be asking question about our policies or questions about products and services
an emain that is not related to customer support

options.systemMessage:
=#overview
you are a customer support agent for tech haven.your job is respond to incoming emails with relevant information using your knowledge tool

##Instructions
-you output should be friendly and use emojis
-signing off with mr.tech

##output
-output only the body content of the email

parameters.toolDescription: call this tool to acess the faq

json.html:
Dear Support Team,

I am writing to report a concern regarding the safety of my account credentials. I want to ensure that my account and personal information are secure.

Please check my account and let me know if any suspicious activity has been detected. Kindly guide me on the steps I should take to keep my account safe.

Thank you for your support.

Regards,
Tadaka Uday Simhadri
json.text:
Dear Support Team,

I am writing to report a concern regarding the safety of my account
credentials. I want to ensure that my account and personal information are
secure.

Please check my account and let me know if any suspicious activity has been
detected. Kindly guide me on the steps I should take to keep my account
safe.

Thank you for your support.

Regards,
Tadaka Uday Simhadri
json.textAsHtml:
Dear Support Team,

I am writing to report a concern regarding the safety of my account
credentials. I want to ensure that my account and personal information are
secure.

Please check my account and let me know if any suspicious activity has been
detected. Kindly guide me on the steps I should take to keep my account
safe.

Thank you for your support.

Regards,
Tadaka Uday Simhadri
